mapper.select: SELECT USER_NO , USER_ID , PASSWORD , NICKNAME , EMAIL , USER_ROLE , PROVIDER , PROVIDER_ID , USE_YN , CREATED_BY , DATE_FORMAT(CREATED_AT, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS CREATED_AT , UPDATED_BY , DATE_FORMAT(UPDATED_AT, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS UPDATED_AT FROM TB_USER_INFO WHERE USER_ID = #{userId}
